content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post iter-321)

## TOP PRIORITY ‚Äî PTC `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (the last substrate pole)

**The iter-321 plan's D3‚Ä≤ reversal signal FIRED.** The plan pre-committed: "if the per-slide restructure
walls on the SAME kabstract/whnf pattern ‚Üí mathlib-analogist cross-domain consult (NOT another paste)."
It did exactly that (applying `scPb_slide` into the giant goal whnf-explodes). So the analogist consult
(step 2 below) is now MANDATORY, not optional ‚Äî alongside the prover's concrete non-paste continuation
route (step 1).

**Do NOT re-dispatch a raw assembly-paste round.** 3 consecutive iters (319/320/321) on this residual;
sorry flat 1‚Üí1 the last 2. The wall is environmental (kabstract whnf-explosion applying a slide `rw`
into the giant goal under lemma-wide `respectTransparency false`), NOT a missing ingredient. The
prover already produced the verified slide motive (`scPb_slide`), the precise goal-derived 7-step
roadmap, and the concrete fix. Next iter = execute that fix + analogist consult, in this order:

1. **Continuation-lemma split (prover).** Build `pullbackTensorMap_restrict_cont h f M N` stated
   **WITHOUT** `backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false`, with `(C := PresheafOfModules (W.presheaf ‚ãô forget‚ÇÇ CommRingCat RingCat))`
   **re-pinned on EVERY `‚äó‚Çò`** (the `trace_state` pretty-printer drops it; verbatim copy elaborates on
   the wrong `Sheaf.val W.ringCatSheaf` carrier ‚Äî the only thing that blocked the scratch attempt this
   iter). Pattern mirrors def `pullbackTensorMap` L1246 / `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_natural` L2008.
   Develop the 7-step slide proof in the fast scratch loop; close the main `sorry` with `exact ‚Ä¶_cont`.
   Slides then run at default transparency like D1‚Ä≤ `pullbackTensorMap_natural`'s `erw [reassoc_of% ‚Ä¶]`
   paste, which does NOT explode.
2. **mathlib-analogist on `cmp_leg` (the genuine remaining math, step 7).** Per-leg core, ‚âà100 LOC,
   = presheaf transpose of the in-file private `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` (mate calculus).
   Statement is in the proof-body roadmap. `simp [pullbackValIso, ‚Üê NatTrans.naturality,
   ‚Üê Functor.map_comp_assoc]` LOOPS (max recursion) ‚Äî needs the explicit mate calculus, not automation.
   Ask whether Mathlib has a packaged composition-coherence for the presheaf‚Üísheaf comparison
   `cmp_g P := Œ∑ ‚â´ forget(pvi_g P)` to shortcut the 100-LOC mirror.
3. If (1) ALSO stalls on a NEW (non-transcription) blocker, effort-break `cmp_leg` finely (one claim
   per lemma) ‚Äî do NOT churn the continuation lemma.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî blueprint prose lags the open Lean (lvb-ptc321 MAJOR, non-blocking)
- Dispatch **blueprint-writer** on `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` to expand the `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange`
  proof sketch: it currently says only "slide past one another by Œ¥_natural‚Ä¶ as in D1‚Ä≤" and never
  previews the `scPb_slide` slides or the ~100-LOC `cmp_leg` presheaf-transpose identity that the Lean
  roadmap calls the genuine remaining work. Bring the prose up to the 7-step structure. (Then
  blueprint-clean + bp re-review per the gate before re-dispatching the PTC prover, if the gate flags it.)

## MINOR ‚Äî coverage debt
- `scPb_slide` (new `private lemma`, PullbackTensorComp.lean L762; naturality of
  `sheafificationCompPullback`, uses `NatTrans.naturality`) ‚Äî new unmatched `lean_aux`, no blueprint
  block. Planner: add a thin block under `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` or tag it a private mechanical
  slide that may stay unmatched. (Total unmatched lean_aux = 382, pre-existing backlog ‚Äî off-front.)

## Off-front (do NOT open unless its lane reopens)
- Broken `\cref`/`\uses` in `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (2) and `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (~12) ‚Äî blueprint-doctor
  iter-321. Pre-existing; repoint when those lanes are next touched.
- FlatBaseChange v4.31.0 restoration (2 kept-opaque sorries off the live path) ‚Äî dedicated
  split-then-restore lane, needs the USER file-split directive first.
- FBC leaf-1 `pullback_preservesFiniteLimits`; FBC per-œÉ hearts (`pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange`
  body, `twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma`) ‚Äî separate FBC lane, not this iter's PTC focus.

## Blocked ‚Äî do NOT re-assign as-is
- `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` via **raw monolithic paste under `respectTransparency false`** ‚Äî the
  slide `rw` into the giant goal whnf-explodes (re-confirmed iters 320 + 321). Only the
  continuation-lemma split (default transparency, `(C := ‚Ä¶)` re-pinned) is sanctioned.
